title: Padlocked
description: Allows you to lock chests by using a renamed trial key on it
body:
Allows you to lock chests by renaming a [**trial key**](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Trial_Key "Trial key wiki page") (or other items in the **padlocked:keys** item tag) and right-clicking it on a chest

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/KtIR6-SzSIs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

(This mod is made for the September 2024 CurseForge modjam)
